title: 为什么在 2026 年， Agent 更适合 Heredoc 式执行，而非 REPL 式交互？
content: The article argues that in 2026, coding agents perform better with Heredoc-style code execution than REPL-style interaction. While CLI tools became the standard interface for agents, complex tasks require too many back-and-forth interactions. The proposed solution uses CLI as an entry point but code as the actual interface, letting agents write complete programs in familiar languages rather than step-by-step commands. Experiments with ego-browser showed Heredoc reduced execution rounds, tool calls, and costs by ~40% compared to REPL, because Heredoc encourages agents to write complete programs upfront while REPL prompts incremental execution. However, this advantage depends on current model capabilities and may shift as tools and training evolve.

Most industries are cyclical, with semiconductors being the strongest cyclical sector over the past fifty years. The best investment opportunities within cycles are reversal plays and growth during cycles. Claiming cyclical stocks are not cyclical is a mistake; special factors may only extend or amplify a cycle. Recognizing the cyclical nature and weighted valuation across full phases reveals whether a stock remains cheap. Capitalizing on cyclical fluctuations enhances returns. In late-cycle periods, investors should exit lower-tier companies first, despite their apparent cheapness.

They run Opus 4.8 xhigh mode, finding Codex's 5.6 SOL ultra-high thinking mode too costly. They also discuss terminal preferences: switched from iTerm2 to Ghostty for better experience, but Ghostty has a severe Chinese input bug in TUIs that deletes characters. They avoided Warp due to integration bloat and commercial conflicts with developer needs.

title: 动力电池新国标落地：“不起火”硬门槛背后，成本“拉锯战”成为关键
content: New Chinese EV battery safety standards taking effect July 2026 mandate no fire or explosion for 2 hours after thermal runaway, replacing the previous 5-minute warning requirement. The rules add bottom impact and fast-charging cycle tests. While major manufacturers like CATL and BYD have already certified compliance, smaller battery makers face 15-20% higher production costs and potential market exit. Cost pressures are reshaping supply chains, with automakers diversifying suppliers. Industry consolidation of 30-40% of small cell producers is anticipated. Standards apply only to new vehicles, not existing stock.

title: 微信“小绿书”会是下一个内容风口吗？
content:
WeChat rebranded its "image-text" feature as "Tie Tu" (pictured posts) in March, pushing short-form, image-heavy content resembling Xiaohongshu across multiple entry points. The platform is actively boosting distribution, with Tie Tu posts reportedly achieving 3-5x higher average views than traditional long articles and 40% longer user dwell time.

The shift responds to declining public account engagement and users migrating to lighter content platforms. Tie Tu advantages include higher completion rates, easier algorithmic distribution, and lower creation barriers enabling frequent posting. However, traffic-dependent monetization risks instability if platform priorities shift.

Key challenges persist: weak community interaction due to limited commenting features, prevalent content reposting from Xiaohongshu, and shallow, clickbait-style posts dominating. The fundamental tension remains whether WeChat can build genuine community atmosphere around short-form content while preserving its long-form depth, or if algorithm-driven short content will ultimately displace substantive

title: 看完《功夫女足》，“周星驰倒欠我一张电影票”
content: Stephen Chow's new film *Kung Fu Soccer* (2025) has drawn unfavorable comparisons to his 2001 classic *Shaolin Soccer*. Despite earning over 400 million yuan in two days, the film holds a mediocre 6.6 Douban rating. Critics cite over-reliance on CGI, forced humor with outdated gender stereotypes, predictable plot, and excessive references to Chow's earlier works. The article notes a shift in audience sentiment: while fans once felt they "owed Chow a movie ticket" for past classics watched via pirated discs, many now feel he owes them one instead. Since Chow transitioned to directing after 2008's *CJ7*, his films have increasingly been seen as recycling old formulas rather than capturing the authentic underdog spirit that made his earlier comedies resonate.

title: 变小的饮料和薯片，只是赵一鸣们的新规矩
content: Discount snack chains like Zhao Yiming are secretly shrinking product sizes—468ml iced tea instead of 500ml, 35g chips instead of 40g—to maintain low prices while protecting margins. These channel-specific items, unknown to most consumers, let brands avoid disrupting supermarket pricing. The shift signals an industry transition: after two years of aggressive expansion and price wars, top players Mingming Busyman and Wanchen Group (controlling 75% of stores) now collude to stabilize profits rather than undercut each other. The "anti-involution" rhetoric masks a simple reality—the land rush ended, and discount retail now operates like ordinary retail, penny by penny.

title: 百度和腾讯，开始抢打工人的开机画面
content: Baidu and Tencent are competing to dominate the AI-powered workplace entry point. Tencent's WorkBuddy integrates AI into WeChat/Enterprise WeChat group chats, capturing where tasks originate. Baidu's DuMate takes a different approach, focusing on end-to-end task execution across applications, delivering finished work products directly. Baidu founder Robin Li proposes "Daily Active Agents" (DAA) as the key metric for AI success—measuring agents that complete real tasks. With its full-stack "chip-cloud-model-agent" ecosystem, Baidu aims to eliminate tedious manual work, while Tencent leverages its social connectivity优势.
